text.source_text: भवेयु स्तावत्प्राणादयः पञ्चजना माध्यन्दिनानाम् , येऽन्नं प्राणादिष्वामनन्ति । काण्वानां तु कथं प्राणादयः पञ्चजना भवेयुः , येऽन्नं प्राणादिषु नामनन्तीति — अत उत्तरं पठति —
text.transliteration_iast: bhaveyu stāvatprāṇādayaḥ pañcajanā mādhyandinānām , ye'nnaṃ prāṇādiṣvāmananti | kāṇvānāṃ tu kathaṃ prāṇādayaḥ pañcajanā bhaveyuḥ , ye'nnaṃ prāṇādiṣu nāmanantīti — ata uttaraṃ paṭhati —

translation.literal_translation: For the Madhyandinas who read 'food' among the prana-group, the fivefold designation is straightforward. But how will it hold for the Kanvas who do not read 'food' there? To answer that, the next statement is read.
